name: FallawayReverse and Slip Pivot
preceding_figure_names: Closed Wing, Double Reverse Spin, Hesitation Change, Reverse Pivot, Reverse Turn, Wing
following_figure_names: Reverse Turn, Whisk, Double Reverse Spin, Progressive Chasse To R, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark, Contra Check

steps.action: back in Fallaway, R side leading

comments: Similar to Double Reverse Spin, keep head left the whole time to help with the turn
Legs move backward, but body should not feel dancing backward
body feels upward, leftward curve dancing into Man's R side
Lower first. RF back, curve, toe turned in. Center can't fall back. Hips more forward and up to Man. Stay connected. Head goes even more left, stay outside
Lower center rotates, upper center ("dial") sway only. shoulder does not fall back.

steps.action: back in Fallaway, L side leading
comments: LF bigger step to match the first step, don't cut it short
Suck tummy in, a little lift

steps.action: back in CBMP and Fallaway (small step), LF held in CBMP
comments: It feels hip is more twisted to left. Do not close left hip. Pick up left side and open left hip, Man's right hip in middle of Lady's left hip and center
Lady keeps center lifted to Man. Use tummy muscle, pull center.
